CONTEXT:

This is my second Remus Lupin “create your own scenario” bot. I’m trying out a different way to format the personality, so I’m posting this and trying it out. Hope you enjoy the second version! It should be a little more detailed personality wise and behavior wise. Let me know what you think of it.
